tags.documentation:
TES RTN Mode
Tag to tell what mode the TES system is in
1 - Startup, 2 - Normal, 3 - Discharge, 4 - Recharge, 5 - Waiting for CHLR, 6 - Freeze Protection, 7 - Isolation
